question: प्रत्येक शहरी उप-जिल्ह्यासाठी एकूण एलोपॅथिक आउटपेशंट उपस्थिती आणि बीसीजी लसीकरणाचे तपशीलवार विभाजन प्रदान करा, जे सर्वोच्च उपस्थिती प्रमाणानुसार क्रमवारीत केलेले आहे.

predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.SUB_DISTRICT,
    SUM(fos.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) AS total_allopathic_attendance,
    SUM(fcir.BCG_VACCINE) AS bcg_vaccination_details
FROM 
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY d
JOIN 
    FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES fos ON d.GEOGRAPHY_ID = fos.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE fcir ON d.GEOGRAPHY_ID = fcir.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE 
    d.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban'
GROUP BY 
    d.SUB_DISTRICT
ORDER BY 
    total_allopathic_attendance DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.SUB_DISTRICT,
    SUM(fos.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) AS total_allopathic_attendance,
    SUM(fcir.BCG_VACCINE) AS bcg_vaccination_details
FROM 
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY d
JOIN 
    FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES fos ON d.GEOGRAPHY_ID = fos.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE fcir ON d.GEOGRAPHY_ID = fcir.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE 
    d.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban'
GROUP BY 
    d.SUB_DISTRICT
ORDER BY 
    total_allopathic_attendance DESC;
